name: Superheavy Samurai Soulgaia Booster
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>留</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>る</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ガイア・ブースター
desc: You can target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control; equip this card from your hand or field to that monster you control. The equipped monster is treated as a Tuner. If you have no Spells/Traps in your GY and this card was equipped to a monster by this card's effect: You can Special Summon this equipped card. You can only use this effect of "Superheavy Samurai Soulgaia Booster" once per turn.
